states.purpose: Fresh Quiver init with no real specs yet.

states.expected: doctor preserves app files and reports missing context only as warnings.

states.purpose: Legacy Quiver layout before the .quiver contract.
states.expected: doctor reports legacy layout and recommends migrate.

states.purpose: Workspace-style repo with multiple app/package folders.
states.expected: doctor avoids scanning dependency/build folders and keeps project map guidance.

states.purpose: Initialized project without a Git repository.
states.expected: doctor warns that Git is required for slices, worktrees, commits, and PRs.
mutating lifecycle commands block or dry-run before writing.
doctor/PR preflight give install guidance for macOS, Linux, and Windows.
doctor warns to quote copied commands.

states.purpose: Project docs disagree on project identity or package manager.
states.expected: prepare-context reports contradictions without modifying product code.

states.purpose: AI agent/profile context is absent or incomplete.
Sanitized Pixel Quiver-style project with completed specs and slice history.
states.expected: plan, graph, export, and doctor use completed slices as history and do not suggest already completed work.

states.purpose: Project has multiple specs and no single active slice.
states.expected: doctor avoids pointing to the wrong spec and falls back to generic safe examples.

states.purpose: Generated context docs exist but the current scan is missing, stale, partial, or legacy.
states.expected: flow and doctor report the source/freshness of context and suggest analyze or prepare-context before planning.
